title: TNT Plus Mod
description: this mod added high quality tnts to minecraft
body:
This mod added many new tnts to minecraft. Some of them are extremely advanced and powerful ,for example Supernova could leave a big hole in your minecraft world with its explosive power that could also kill nearly anything in the game.

TNT List
- C4 : little stronger than normal tnt
- Supernova : **the most powerful tnt in this mod**
- Timeable Bomb : you can control how long till it explodes
- Nuclear : explode ,burn ,and send radiation to mobs around
- Fountain Bomb : explode like a fountain
- Magnetic Bomb : pull mobs toward it and explode
- Levitation TNT : levitate far to the sky and explode
- Sonic Bomb : explode bypass armor similar to Warden's sonic boom
- Toxic TNT : generate toxic gases in nearby area which is strong enough to kill monsters like zombies or skeletons
- Napalm : set the whole area to fire
- Tornado Generator : summon tornado that can destroy block and pull mobs around toward and spin
- Crate of Fireworks : send firework to the sky (for party i guess)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Jvu0PaK1oAQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Note : this mod isn't 100% completed so in the near future ,more tnt can be added. If you have any tnt suggestions for this mod ,feel free to comment and let me know ,I'll consider them. Thank you for downloading!
